lifecycleScripts.afterStart: npx wp-env run cli -- wp rewrite structure '/%postname%/' --hard && (npx wp-env run cli -- wp plugin is-installed advanced-custom-fields && npx wp-env run cli -- wp plugin activate advanced-custom-fields || npx wp-env run cli -- wp plugin install --activate advanced-custom-fields) && (npx wp-env run cli -- wp plugin is-installed jwt-authentication-for-wp-rest-api && npx wp-env run cli -- wp plugin activate jwt-authentication-for-wp-rest-api || npx wp-env run cli -- wp plugin install --activate jwt-authentication-for-wp-rest-api) && npx wp-env run cli -- wp eval-file wp-content/seed-content.php
